description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a sprawling footprint, surrounded by a well-maintained green lawn and a small pond or pool area. The structure is primarily composed of light-colored walls, with a flat or gently sloped roof and several windows distributed across its facades. The front of the bungalow includes a covered porch area, providing a welcoming entrance and outdoor seating space. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, enhancing the modern residential aesthetic. The property is bordered by landscaping elements, including shrubs and pathways, which add to its suburban charm. The overall design suggests a comfortable, contemporary home suitable for a family in an urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a light exterior, flat roof, covered porch, and landscaped yard featuring a pond. Asymmetrical window arrangement and inviting entrance highlight its suburban appeal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and landscaped yard with a pond.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the structure, additional windows, and part of the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, more windows, and the continuation of the green lawn.
description_view_3: Angled view highlighting the porch, pond, and the overall layout of the bungalow and yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
